summary: Iteration 288 - Sovereign Physics Engine Testing. ALL FEATURES VERIFIED: All 6 physics modules exist and are properly imported in App.js. Minting Ceremony page loads with 13 crystalline nodes visible. Emergency Shut-Off button in top-left corner (position: top=8px, left=8px). All physics constants verified: R_LIMIT=47.94, GOLD_VISCOSITY=0.05, GOLD_PUSH=2, GOLD_HONEY=#fbc02d. Vogel-Phyllotaxis skeleton with 137.508° golden angle working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: KNOWN PRE-EXISTING ISSUE - React context loop errors persist but do not prevent functionality

SovereignRefractor.js: 13-node skeleton (12 orbital + 1 SOURCE) with hexagonal boundary constraint - VERIFIED
SovereignStabilizer.js: Gold Layer constants (R_LIMIT=47.94, GOLD_HONEY=#fbc02d, GOLD_VISCOSITY=0.05, GOLD_PUSH=2) - VERIFIED
StabilizerCanvas.js: Canvas physics visualizer with matching Gold Layer config - VERIFIED
RefractionEngine.js: White→Rainbow split logic with Particle class, ignite/burst/start/stop methods - VERIFIED
SovereignHandshake.js: Bi-directional orchestrator with execute/reset/pulseUI/renderRainbowKey methods - VERIFIED
RainbowKeyGenerator.js: Key encryption with Black Hills calibration (44.08, -103.23) - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sovereign Physics Engine fully tested. All 6 physics modules verified: SovereignRefractor (Vogel-Phyllotaxis 137.508°), SovereignStabilizer (Gold Layer), StabilizerCanvas (visualizer), RefractionEngine (rainbow split), SovereignHandshake (orchestrator), RainbowKeyGenerator (key encryption). The 'Maximum update depth exceeded' errors are a KNOWN PRE-EXISTING issue that does not prevent functionality.
